title: हालेलूयाह स्तुति करो
author: Traditional

scriptureRefs.note: Let every thing that hath breath praise the LORD
From the rising of the sun unto the going down of the same the LORD's name is to be praised

story: An energetic praise hymn popular in Pentecostal and charismatic Hindi-speaking congregations across North India. The word 'Hallelujah' is woven together with Hindi expressions of praise, creating a powerful song that unites believers in exuberant worship. It has been passed down through oral tradition in revival meetings for many decades.

lines: प्रभु की स्तुति सब मिलकर करो
linesRomanized: Prabhu ki stuti sab milkar karo

lines: वह योग्य है सब स्तुति के
linesRomanized: Woh yogya hai sab stuti ke
